description_long: This motorcycle features a rugged, utilitarian design with a prominent front windshield, dual rearview mirrors, and a large, rounded headlamp. The frame is exposed and angular, with a minimalist rear section that includes a sturdy luggage rack and a single seat. The wheels are spoked and fitted with knobby tires, suggesting off-road capability, while the front and rear fenders are pronounced for added protection. The fuel tank is large and smoothly contoured, and the handlebars are wide for enhanced control. The overall color scheme is a combination of matte white and black, with metallic and rubber components visible throughout.
description: A robust, white and black motorcycle with a large windshield, spoked wheels, and a minimalist rear luggage rack, designed for both urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide handlebars, dual mirrors, large headlamp, and windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the exposed frame, single seat, luggage rack, and spoked wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the rear tire, luggage rack, and the back of the seat and frame.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the fuel tank, engine area, and the full length of the frame and wheels.
